tools.name: music.play
tools.description: Play music, optionally searching by query first.

tools.name: board.add_widget
tools.description: Add an existing widget definition to the current board.

tools.name: music.next
tools.description: Play the next music result.

tools.name: music.pause
tools.description: Pause the current music widget playback.

tools.name: music.previous
tools.description: Play the previous music result.

tools.name: music.resume
tools.description: Resume music widget playback.

tools.name: tv.fullscreen
tools.description: Enter fullscreen for TV playback.

tools.name: tv.pause
tools.description: Pause TV playback.

tools.name: tv.play
tools.description: Play TV, optionally selecting a channel.

tools.name: tv.select_channel
tools.description: Select a TV channel by name or URL.

tools.name: widget.focus
tools.description: Focus an existing widget on the current board.

capabilities: board.add_widget | Add an existing widget definition to the current board.
music.play | Play music, optionally searching by query first. | requiresTarget
music.next | Play the next music result. | requiresTarget
music.pause | Pause the current music widget playback. | requiresTarget
music.previous | Play the previous music result. | requiresTarget
music.resume | Resume music widget playback. | requiresTarget
riskSummary: 关闭音乐是关闭窗口，调用 widget.remove，不是暂停播放
暂停音乐是暂停播放，调用 music.pause
播放、搜索和控制需要已挂载 music capability

capabilities: tv.fullscreen | Enter fullscreen for TV playback. | requiresTarget
tv.play | Play TV, optionally selecting a channel. | requiresTarget
tv.select_channel | Select a TV channel by name or URL. | requiresTarget
riskSummary: 与 music 播放存在媒体冲突
scoped context 只发送频道/播放摘要

capabilities: widget.focus | Focus an existing widget on the current board. | requiresTarget

tools.name: music.search
tools.description: Search music without starting playback.
examples: 我想听点放松的不一定播放
